name: mootive-backend
description: AWS SAM backend for Mootive: Cognito, Lambda, DynamoDB, Bedrock (Claude Haiku 4.5), and Amazon Location Service.

scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/lib/dynamo.js && node --check src/lib/http.js && node --check src/routes/users.js && node --check src/routes/drivers.js && node --check src/routes/deliveries.js && node --check src/routes/ai.js && node --check src/routes/routing.js && node --check scripts/seed-demo-data.js

author: Mootive Team
